1000652172.english: It's like a garden, isn't it?

1000652173.english: That would be nice to have when you're resting.

1000652177.english: Okay. I'll come visit once I get some work done.

1000652180.english: Hmm... So that's the Setting, right?

1000652185.english: Are you fighting the Lemonade Delta?

1000652190.english: Didn't you just give up because there were too many enemies?
1000652190.korean: 그냥 적이 너무 많아서 포기한 거 아냐?

1000652191.english: ... Okay. Please take care of me too.

1000652193.english: It looks like our team members met.

1000652201.english: Jinjo kid? That, the Cyclops Princess, right?

1000652203.english: Just say it's the Arctic Exploration Team.

1000652207.english: The fact that they went out of their way to make contact means they were willing to talk, right?
1000652207.korean: 굳이 접촉을 했다는 건 이야기를 나눌 마음이 들었다는 거겠지?

1000652210.english: I heard you helped our team members.

1000652213.english: Thank you. If it weren't for you, we definitely would have lost the crew.
1000652213.korean: 고마워. 너희가 아니었으면 분명 대원들을 잃었을거야.

1000652215.english: I prepared it to give to you when you come back.

1000652216.english: Make yourself comfortable for a while. I'll come visit if I have time.
1000652216.korean: 한동안 편하게 있어. 시간 나면 찾아갈게.

1000652217.english: Whew... Well, did you take the first step well? AAAAAAAH! What is this?!

1000652219.english: Uh, yeah. Nice to meet you.

1000652221.english: It's okay. I don't care. And...

1000652222.english: Thank you for taking care of our kids.

1000652224.english: I want to know why you're fighting.

1000652228.english: Thanks to that, I understand a bit now.

1000652230.english: I heard there was a problem with the fuselage?

1000652231.english: It's okay, don't worry. If you're interested, I'll ask the doctor and Azaz to take a look.
1000652231.korean: 괜찮으니까 걱정마. 생각 있으면 닥터랑 아자즈한테 봐달라고 할게.

1000652235.english: Is it the same as just repairing and transforming? I don't know much, but there are probably structural problems too.
1000652235.korean: 그냥 수리랑 변신하는 거랑 같아? 잘 모르지만 구조적인 문제도 있을거고.

1000652236.english: I'll go. The princess of the True Clan called for me.

1000652237.english: ...... I should have the medical team on standby.

1000652238.english: How is the settlement work going?

1000652243.english: Yeah. I was happy you liked it too.

1000652244.english: ...Are you trying to trick me again and prepare a surprise year-end party this time?
1000652244.korean: …혹시 이번에도 날 속이고 깜짝 연말 파티를 준비하려는 건 아니지?

1000652245.english: It's okay. Because I'm getting enough even normally.

1000652246.english: ... Me too. Thank you for being by my side.

1000652249.english: Oh, was there such a vote?

1000652260.english: I guess I'll just have to listen quietly.

1000652261.english: - While walking inside the ark, I suddenly remembered that they had told me to come find Mnemosyne if I ever needed her.
1000652261.korean: - 방주 내부를 걷다가 문득 므네모시네가 필요할 때 찾아오라는 이야기를 했다는 것을 떠올렸다.

1000652262.english: - He headed toward a small passage in the corner of the lobby, where the crew members were bustling about.
1000652262.korean: - 대원들이 분주히 돌아다니는 로비 구석에 있는 작은 통로로 향했다.

1000652264.english: - I reached the end of the corridor and knocked on the door.

1000652266.english: - As I entered the room, Mnemosyne rose from the small chair beside the bed.
1000652266.korean: - 방에 들어가자, 므네모시네는 침대 옆에 딸린 작은 의자에서 일어났다.

1000652267.english: I was waiting to prevent energy consumption.

1000652268.english: While getting some sleep is ideal, it makes immediate response difficult, so I've been avoiding it since the previous incident.
1000652268.korean: 수면을 취하는 것이 최선이긴 하지만, 즉각적인 대응이 어려워지므로 이전 사건 이후로는 지양하는 중입니다.

1000652270.english: Incomprehensible. This entity does not require a hobby.

1000652271.english: This entity was created to manage the Ark of Memory alone for a long time.
1000652271.korean: 본 개체는 오랜 시간, 기억의 방주를 홀로 관리하도록 제작되었습니다.

1000652272.english: Such human emotions interfere with work.

1000652276.english: Perhaps... Do you have any requests for this entity?
1000652276.korean: 혹시... 본 개체에게 요청하실 사항이 있으십니까?

1000652278.english: Story... you mean with this entity?

1000652279.english: ...Request confirmed. What topic would you like to talk about?

1000652280.english: - Now that I'm actually asked this question, I'm speechless.
1000652280.korean: - 막상 이런 질문을 받으니 말문이 막히는걸.

1000652281.english: In the end, the day consisted only of a few of my superficial questions and Mnemosyne's extremely brief answers.
1000652281.korean: - 결국 이날은 내 피상적인 질문과 므네모시네의 초단답만 몇 번 이어질 뿐이었다.

1000652282.english: - A short while later, while poking around the system in the information zone, I discovered something interesting.
1000652282.korean: - 얼마 후, 정보 구역에서 시스템을 이리저리 뒤적이던 중 흥미로운 것을 발견했다.

1000652283.english: - Judging by "Administrator," the owner of this ID must be Mnemosyne.
1000652283.korean: - Administrator라는 걸로 봐선 이 ID의 주인은 므네모시네겠지.

1000652285.english: - Several members are each engrossed in their work.
1000652285.korean: - 몇 명인가 보이는 대원들은 각자 저마다 작업에 열중하고 있다.

1000652286.english: - Curiosity about what information that machine-like Mnemosyne might have seen ultimately overcame conscience.
1000652286.korean: - 그 기계 같은 므네모시네는 어떤 정보를 보았을지에 대한 호기심이 결국 양심을 이겼다.

1000652287.english: - The information access records were categorized.
1000652287.korean: - 정보 열람 기록은 카테고리별로 분류되어 있었다.

1000652288.english: - Among those, the Administrator ID only viewed categories that were mostly Biology-Plants-Flowers. And that, tens of thousands of times.
1000652288.korean: - 그중 Administrator라는 ID가 열람한 카테고리는 대부분 생물-식물-꽃 카테고리뿐. 그것도 수만 번.

1000652289.english: - A while ago, I remembered that there was a small but well-maintained potted plant in the corner of Mnemosyne's room.
1000652289.korean: - 얼마 전, 므네모시네의 방 구석에 작지만 잘 관리된 화분이 있었던 것이 떠올랐다.

1000652290.english: - Feeling my heart soften without realizing it, I headed toward Mnemosyne's room.
1000652290.korean: - 나도 모르게 마음이 포근해지는 것을 느끼며 므네모시네의 방으로 향했다.

1000652292.english: - Mnemosyne greeted me in the same form as last time.
1000652292.korean: - 므네모시네는 저번과 똑같은 모습으로 나를 맞아주었다.

1000652294.english: - For the first time, a crack appeared in the icy expression of Mnemosyne.
1000652294.korean: - 처음으로 얼음장같던 므네모시네의 표정에 균열이 생겼다.

1000652295.english: - Mnemosyne's gaze, which had been aimlessly wandering the floor for a while, turned toward me.
1000652295.korean: - 한동안 정처없이 바닥을 맴돌던 므네모시네의 시선이 내게로 향했다.

1000652297.english: - Just as I remembered from last time, a small pot with white flowers blooming in it was placed by the head of the bed.
1000652297.korean: - 저번의 기억대로, 침대 머리맡에는 하얀 꽃이 피어 있는 작은 화분이 놓여 있었다.

1000652299.english: - Seeing where my gaze was directed, Mnemosyne, who let out a sound that was neither a gasp nor a scream, blocked the path in front of the flowerpot.
1000652299.korean: - 내 시선이 향하는 곳을 보고 탄성인지 비명인지 모를 소리를 낸 므네모시네는 화분 앞을 가로막았다.

1000652300.english: ...I would like to request that you reconsider, Administrator.

1000652301.english: This action was taken within the limits that do not interfere with the duties of this entity, and if you check the work records-
1000652301.korean: 이것은 본 개체의 업무에 방해가 되지 않는 한도 내에서 이루어진 행동으로, 업무 기록을 확인해보시면-

1000652302.english: Then why did you say such things to this entity?
1000652302.korean: 그러면 어째서 본 개체에게 그런 말씀을 하신 건가요?

1000652303.english: - If you ask why, I don't really have an answer...
1000652303.korean: - 왜라고 물으면 또 딱히 대답할 말이 없는데…

1000652304.english: ...incomprehensible. Every action has a reason, a trigger, and a motive.
1000652304.korean: …이해불능. 모든 행동에는 이유와 계기, 동기가 있습니다.

1000652305.english: Scratching his head as he saw Mnemosyne clearly showing her guard up, he decided to be honest.
1000652305.korean: - 확연한 경계심을 내비치는 므네모시네를 보며 머리를 긁적이다 솔직하게 말하기로 했다.

1000652307.english: - After blinking silently for a while, Mnemosyne stepped aside.
1000652307.korean: - 한동안 말없이 눈을 깜빡이던 므네모시네가 한발짝 옆으로 비켜섰다.

1000652308.english: ...As you mentioned, this entity is very interested in the classification of the creature you call a 'wildflower'.
1000652308.korean: …말씀하신대로, 본 개체는 이 ‘들꽃’이라는 생물의 분류에 큰 흥미를 가지고 있습니다.

1000652309.english: It is an anemone belonging to the genus Anemone in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae), order Ranunculales, class Dicotyledoneae, division Angiospermae.
1000652309.korean: 속씨식물문 쌍떡잎식물강 미나리아재비목 미나리아재비과 바람꽃속의 아네모네입니다.

1000652311.english: - Is this the expression someone makes when they feel the emotion of surprise for the first time?
1000652311.korean: - 놀라움이라는 감정을 처음으로 느껴보는 사람이 짓는 표정이 이런걸까.

1000652312.english: - After staring blankly at me for a while, Mnemosyne finally opened her mouth.
1000652312.korean: - 한동안 멍하니 나를 바라보던 므네모시네가 간신히 입을 열었다.

1000652314.english: I've never thought about it that way, not even once.
1000652314.korean: 그런 식으로 생각해 본적은, 한 번도… 없습니다.

1000652317.english: - Anemone, Mnemosyne, Mnemosyne murmured softly, and her eyes, barely visible, curved slightly.
1000652317.korean: - 아네모네, 므네모시네, 하고 작게 중얼거린 므네모시네의 눈이 보일듯말듯 휘어졌다.

1000652319.english: - Unlike before, Mnemosyne seemed a little pleased when talking about wildflowers.
1000652319.korean: - 이전과는 달리, 들꽃에 대해 이야기하는 므네모시네는 조금 기뻐보였다.

1000652320.english: ...it's the first time I've seen live penguins and chinchillas.

1000652321.english: It's... an incredible feeling of exhilaration.

1000652323.english: Wow... Tiger is being so well-behaved...

1000652325.english: I've never seen them nervous in front of other people.
1000652325.korean: 난 얘가 다른 사람 앞에서 불안해하는 걸 본 적이 없는데.

1000652327.english: - This time, I came to find Mnemosyne with Empress and Setti.
1000652327.korean: - 이번엔 엠프리스, 세띠와 함께 므네모시네를 찾아왔다.

1000652328.english: - As expected, Mnemosyne showed great interest in Tiger and Pengsoon.
1000652328.korean: - 예상했던대로 므네모시네는 타이거와 펭순이에게 큰 관심을 보였다.

1000652329.english: This penguin... is it okay to touch it if it's an individual that has seen 'Pengsoon-i'?
1000652329.korean: 이 펭귄… ‘펭순이’를 본 개체가 만져봐도 괜찮습니까?

1000652330.english: Then. Unlike Tiger, Pengsoon is kind and easygoing - ouch!
1000652330.korean: 그럼. 타이거랑 다르게 펭순이는 착하고 무던하니- 아얏!

1000652332.english: Hey, did he just bite me?

1000652335.english: Even while a small commotion was brewing due to the two androids and one chinchilla, Mnemosyne was seriously stroking Pengsoon.
1000652335.korean: - 두 바이오로이드와 한 마리의 친칠라 때문에 작은 소란이 난 동안에도 므네모시네는 진지하게 펭순이를 쓰다듬고 있었다.

1000652338.english: - After stroking Pengsoon for a while, Mnemosyne reached out and placed her hand on my cheek.
1000652338.korean: - 한동안 펭순이를 쓰다듬던 므네모시네는 손을 뻗어 내 볼에 가져다 댔다.

1000652339.english: ...The administrator's touch is different from both Pengsoon's and this individual's.

1000652344.english: Co, Commander! Get the tiger off me!

1000652346.english: - Tiger was biting Empress's index finger hard, his cheeks puffed out.
1000652346.korean: - 타이거는 볼을 빵빵하게 부풀린채로 엠프리스의 검지 손가락을 힘껏 물고 있었다.

1000652348.english: What are you trying to do- oh?

1000652349.english: - As Mnemosyne embraced Tiger with both hands, as if it had never happened, Tiger fell from the Empress's finger.
1000652349.korean: - 므네모시네가 양 손으로 타이거를 감싸자 언제 그랬냐는듯 타이거는 엠프리스의 손가락에서 떨어졌다.

1000652350.english: ...I'm feeling incredibly betrayed right now, is it okay for me to feel that way?
1000652350.korean: …나 지금 엄청 배신감 느끼는데, 그래도 되지?

1000652351.english: I've been with Tiger for so long!
1000652351.korean: 내가 타이거랑 보고 지낸 게 얼만데!

1000652352.english: I'm sorry, I'm sorry, I'm sorry...

1000652353.english: Here it is. 'Tiger' is really... judged to be 'cute'.

1000652355.english: - Even after that, Mnemosyne continued to toy with Tiger, Pengsoon, and me for a while.
1000652355.korean: - 그 이후로도 한동안 므네모시네는 타이거와 펭순이, 그리고 나를 만지작거렸다.

1000652356.english: You mean what I want to do?

1000652357.english: I would like to ask you to tell me the reason...

1000652358.english: - Recently, after watching Mnemosyne playing with Tiger and Pengsoon, and also after talking about various things, I've come to realize something.
1000652358.korean: - 얼마전 타이거와 펭순이와 노는 므네모시네를 보고, 또 이것저것 이야기를 나누며 느낀 것이 있다.

1000652359.english: - It's not that Mnemosyne doesn't have emotions, it's that she doesn't know what emotions she's feeling.
1000652359.korean: - 므네모시네에게는 감정이 없는 것이 아니라, 자신이 느끼는 감정이 무엇인지 모르는 거라고.

1000652360.english: ...Then, I'd like to go on an outing.

1000652361.english: - Mnemosyne was definitely only on the ark, so she must be curious about the outside.
1000652361.korean: - 확실히 므네모시네는 방주에만 있었으니 바깥이 궁금하겠지.

1000652363.english: In addition to that, I would like to request one more thing.
1000652363.korean: 그것에 더해, 한 가지를 더 요청드리고 싶습니다.

1000652364.english: I want to do that "outing" activity... with you, manager.
1000652364.korean: 그 ‘나들이’라는 행위를… 관리자님과 함께 하고 싶습니다.

1000652365.english: Although it was a short time, this entity experienced many things thru the administrator and felt a special sense of elation.
1000652365.korean: 짧은 시간이었지만, 본 개체는 관리자님을 통해 여러가지를 경험했고, 특별한 고양감을 느꼈습니다.

1000652366.english: Because it was a sensation the main entity had never experienced before, they repeated the actions they had performed with the administrator several times on their own.
1000652366.korean: 그것은 본 개체가 한 번도 느껴본 적 없는 감각이었기에, 혼자서 몇 번이고 관리자님과 함께 했던 행위들을 되풀이 해보았습니다.

1000652367.english: However, I couldn't feel that sense of exhilaration on my own.
1000652367.korean: 다만, 혼자서는 그러한 고양감을 느낄 수 없었습니다.

1000652368.english: Therefore, this entity has concluded that it feels uplifted not by its actions, but by the fact that it is with you, the administrator.
1000652368.korean: 그에따라, 본 개체는 그 행위들이 아닌 관리자님과 함께한다는 사실에서 고양감을 느낀다는 결론을 내렸습니다.

1000652370.english: It is estimated that preparing this object for its outing will take approximately 2 hours and 38 minutes.
1000652370.korean: 본 개체의 ‘나들이’ 준비에는 약 2시간 38분이 소요될 것으로 예상됩니다.

1000652371.english: I would like to request that we meet at the entrance to the ark in three hours from now.
1000652371.korean: 지금으로부터 3시간 후에 방주 입구에서 만나는 것을 요청드립니다.

1000652372.english: - Upon hearing my answer, Mnemosyne bowed her head and quickly left the room.
1000652372.korean: - 내 대답을 들은 므네모시네는 고개를 꾸벅 숙이고 빠른 걸음으로 방을 나섰다.

1000652374.english: - I came out to the entrance of the ark at the agreed time. Not long after, Mnemosyne...
1000652374.korean: - 약속한 시간에 맞춰 방주 입구로 나왔다. 얼마 지나지 않아 므네모시네가…

1000652375.english: - Mnemosyne appeared not in the suit she was originally wearing, but in a pure white dress.
1000652375.korean: - 므네모시네는 원래 입고 있던 슈트가 아닌, 청순한 원피스 차림으로 나타났다.

1000652377.english: Preparing for the outing took more time than I expected.
1000652377.korean: ‘나들이’ 준비에 생각보다 더 많은 시간이 소요되었습니다.

1000652378.english: That's right. Based on the search results, it appears this attire is suitable for an outing.
1000652378.korean: 그렇습니다. 검색 결과, ‘나들이’에 적합한 복장이라고 판단됩니다.

1000652380.english: - Either I'm mistaken, or Mnemosyne's face seemed a little flushed.
1000652380.korean: - 내 착각인지, 므네모시네의 얼굴이 조금 붉어진 것 같았다.

1000652381.english: ...incomprehensible. This entity was simply sculpted this way.
1000652381.korean: …이해불능. 본 개체는 그저 이렇게 조형되었을 뿐입니다.

1000652385.english: - I walked thru the pure white snowfield with Mnemosyne.

1000652388.english: Among the information this entity has viewed, the most beautiful time for flowers is when they are waiting for spring beneath the snow. There was a phrase that said...
1000652388.korean: 본 개체가 열람한 정보들 중, ‘꽃은 눈 아래에서 봄을 기다리고 있을 때가 가장 아름답다.’라는 구절이 있었습니다.

1000652390.english: - Saying that, Mnemosyne suddenly stopped walking.
1000652390.korean: - 그렇게 말하고, 므네모시네는 문득 걸음을 멈췄다.

1000652391.english: ...Administrator. I have one question I'd like to ask.
1000652391.korean: …관리자님. 한 가지, 묻고 싶은 것이 있습니다.

1000652392.english: Could you tell me what this feeling is that this entity is experiencing by your side, Administrator?
1000652392.korean: 본 개체가 관리자님의 곁에서 느끼는 이 감정이 무엇인지… 혹시 알려주실 수 있으십니까?

1000652393.english: - How should I answer this...? As I stammered in response to the difficult question, Mnemosyne asked again.
1000652393.korean: - 이건 어떻게 대답해줘야하지… 난처한 질문에 내가 말을 흐리자, 므네모시네는 재차 물었다.

1000652394.english: Thru information access and self-analysis, I've come to understand that this feeling is closer to 'liking' or 'affection.'
1000652394.korean: 정보 열람 및 자가분석을 통해, 이 감정이 ‘호감’이나 ‘애정’에 가깝다는 사실은 알게 되었습니다.

1000652395.english: However... why this entity feels such emotions...
1000652395.korean: 다만… 어째서 본 개체가 그런 감정을 느끼는 것인지…

1000652397.english: ...incomprehensible. Human and person are almost synonyms. There is no usage like the one you are using, Administrator.
1000652397.korean: …이해불능. 인간과 사람은 동의어에 가깝습니다. 관리자님처럼 사용하는 용례는 존재하지 않습니다.

1000652399.english: ... Are you saying that anemones and violets both belong to the classification of flowers?
1000652399.korean: ...아네모네와 제비꽃이 둘 다 꽃의 분류에 속하는 것처럼, 말씀이십니까?

1000652400.english: - Mnemosyne, who had been thinking with her hand on her chest as if reflecting on her own words, looked at me.
1000652400.korean: - 자신의 말을 되새기는 것처럼 가슴에 손을 올린채 무언가를 생각하던 므네모시네는 나를 바라보았다.

1000652401.english: The entity in question does not yet fully understand it. However...
1000652401.korean: 아직 본 개체는 그것을 완전히 이해하지는 못하고 있습니다. 그렇지만…

1000652402.english: Somehow, I feel like I understand.

1000652403.english: - Mnemosyne said that and took a step closer to me.
1000652403.korean: - 므네모시네는 그렇게 말하며 내게 한 걸음 다가섰다.

1000652404.english: Administrator, I request that this entity remain by your side until it clarifies what this emotion is.
1000652404.korean: 관리자님, 본 개체가 이 감정이 무엇인지 해명할 때까지… 관리자님 곁에 머무는 것을 요청드립니다.

1000652405.english: - As she said that and gave a little smile, the single flower of snow, that was more beautiful than any spring landscape.
1000652405.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 생긋 웃는 설원의 꽃 한송이는, 그 어떤 봄의 풍경보다도 아름다웠다.

1000652407.english: - To check the recovery progress, I went to one side of the drone's gene zone, where cold air was billowing.
1000652407.korean: - 복구 진행 상황을 확인하기 위해 들론 유전자 구역 한 쪽에서 냉기가 풀풀 날리고 있었다.

1000652410.english: - Ignoring the greetings, Titania was looking down at the floor.
1000652410.korean: - 인사도 듣는둥 마는둥 하고, 티타니아는 바닥을 내려다보고 있었다.

1000652411.english: - Storage containers scattered haphazardly on the floor.

1000652412.english: - The cold felt even stronger near Titania.
1000652412.korean: - 티타니아의 곁에서는 냉기가 한층 더 강하게 느껴졌다.

1000652414.english: - Titania picked up a luxurious container from the floor.
1000652414.korean: - 티타니아는 바닥에서 고급스러운 용기 하나를 집어들었다.

1000652415.english: - Attached to the surface was a dog tag clearly engraved with the words 'Titania Frost'.
1000652415.korean: - 겉면에는 ‘Titania Frost’라는 글자가 선명히 박힌 인식표가 달려있었다.

1000652416.english: It would have been better if the queen had ended up like this instead.

1000652417.english: - In the red eyes that looked at me coldly, there was hatred and resentment. And... a little sadness.
1000652417.korean: - 나를 차갑게 바라보는 붉은색 눈동자에는 증오와 원망. 그리고… 약간의 슬픔.

1000652418.english: Rather than being born into a world filled only with such suffering.

1000652419.korean: - 티타니아가 가진 아픔에 대해서는 알고 있다.

1000652420.english: - It was created simultaneously with Leia but was unstable, and to compensate for this, deep-seated feelings of inferiority and hatred toward Leia were instilled in it.
1000652420.korean: - 레아와 동시에 만들어졌지만 불안정했고, 그것을 메꾸기 위해 레아에 대한 뿌리깊은 피해의식과 증오가 심어졌다.

1000652422.english: - And as a side effect of forcibly establishing unstable genetic traits, Titania is constantly in excruciating pain as if her entire body is being wrung out.
1000652422.korean: - 그리고 불안정한 유전 형질을 강제로 성립시킨 부작용으로, 티타니아는 항시 온 몸을 쥐어짜는 듯한 고통을 느끼고 있다.

1000652424.english: You... you who brought the queen back to this world of nothing but pain, ugh...
1000652424.korean: 네가… 이 고통뿐인 세상에 여왕을 되살린 네가, 윽…

1000652425.english: Do you think you're qualified to comfort the Queen?

1000652426.english: - As Titania said, it is my responsibility that I restored her and caused her suffering.
1000652426.korean: - 티타니아의 말대로, 티타니아를 복원해 고통받게 만든 것은 내 책임이다.

1000652429.english: That's interesting. Go ahead and try it.

1000652430.english: ...You. Are you really out of your mind?

1000652432.english: - Titania, who had been glaring at me with a bewildered expression, let out a small sigh.
1000652432.korean: - 어이없다는 얼굴로 날 노려보던 티타니아는 작게 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000652433.english: Okay. Talking to you makes even the queen feel like a fool.
1000652433.korean: 됐어. 너랑 이야기하면 여왕도 바보가 되는 기분이야.

1000652434.english: - Whether it was from the pain or not, I stumbled and grabbed Titania's slender arm as she brushed past.
1000652434.korean: - 고통 때문인지 비척이며 스쳐지나가는 티타니아의 가느다란 팔을 붙잡았다.

1000652437.english: - Titania disappeared with a precarious step.

1000652438.english: - No matter what reasons you give, restoring Titania was ultimately a selfish act.
1000652438.korean: - 이런 저런 이유를 붙여도, 티타니아를 복원한 것은 결과적으로는 이기적인 행동이었다.

1000652439.english: - Did I become complacent, thinking I was familiar enough with dealing with androids after all this time?
1000652439.korean: - 그동안의 경험으로 바이오로이드들을 대하는 것에 충분히 익숙해졌다고 자만한걸까...

1000652440.english: Feeling a chill in my chest from the lingering cold, I also turned and followed Titania.
1000652440.korean: - 아직도 남아있는 냉기에 가슴이 시리는 것을 느끼며, 나도 티타니아를 따라 발걸음을 돌렸다.

1000652442.english: Oh, I'm so flustered. I need to rest a bit.

1000652443.english: Hmm, those cookies look delicious, don't they? Here we go - oof?!
1000652443.korean: 흐음, 맛있어보이는 쿠키네? 어디 한 번- 읏?!

1000652444.english: This is the dessert to be presented to the master. Take your greedy hands away.
1000652444.korean: 주인께 진상할 디저트이옵니다. 그 탐욕스러운 손을 치우시지요.

1000652445.english: Hmph. You think I'm going to be scared just because you threw a fork, hiccup. Do you know?
1000652445.korean: 흥. 그깟 포크 하나 던진다고 내가 놀랄 줄 알, 딸꾹. 알아?

1000652447.english: ...Then I'll have to tell the commander to eat me instead of dessert.
1000652447.korean: …그러면 사령관에겐 디저트 대신 나를 먹으라고 해야겠네.

1000652448.english: And as a bonus, I'll... get a taste of the commander too.

1000652450.english: Oh... right. Chef, Chef! The food ingredient packaging is finished. Now you just need to move it.
1000652450.korean: 아… 그렇지. 주, 주방장님! 식자재 포장이 끝났어요. 이제 옮기기만 하면 돼요.

1000652451.english: Mr. Echidna, I made a new dessert, would you like to try some?
1000652451.korean: 에키드나 씨, 제가 새로운 디저트를 만들었는데 맛 좀 봐주실래요?

1000652452.english: I'm not interested. Because I want to eat the commander right now.
1000652452.korean: 관심없어. 나는 지금 사령관을 먹고 싶으니까.

1000652454.english: Oh, what should I do...? If you fight again...

1000652456.english: Oh... Um, does Ms. Echidna find the commander delicious?!
1000652456.korean: 아...... 그, 에키드나 씨는 사령관이 맛있으세요?!

1000652460.english: No, no, no, no, no, that's not it!

1000652461.english: Ms. Echidna loves to eat, and I heard she also enjoys eating the commander... Chef, the food... as much as... I was wondering if it was delicious, so...
1000652461.korean: 에키드나 씨는 먹는 걸 엄청 좋아하시는데, 사령관을 먹는 것도 좋아하신다길래... 주, 주방장님 음식... 만큼... 맛있으신가, 해서...

1000652462.english: Do you know what you're saying right now?
1000652462.korean: 지금 본인이 무슨 말을 하고 있는지는 알고 계시옵니까?

1000652464.english: I was wondering what that noise was.

1000652465.english: Of course it's an unparalleled delicacy, isn't it? If he were a man like the commander.
1000652465.korean: 둘도 없는 별미인 게 당연하잖아? 사령관 같은 남자라면.

1000652466.english: And when we kiss... Especially with your mouth-

1000652469.english: That's fortunate. It wasn't for the sake of the Echidna, tho.
1000652469.korean: 그거 다행이옵니다. 에키드나 양을 위한 일은 아니었사옵니다만.

1000652471.english: Body fluids and odors can vary significantly depending on the food you eat.
1000652471.korean: 체액과 체취는 먹는 음식에 따라 크게 변할 수 있사옵니다.

1000652472.english: Even if you're not a natural like Ms. Aurora.

1000652474.english: My diet management is perfect, so it's not strange that the fragrance and taste are good for the master.
1000652474.korean: 소첩의 식단관리는 완벽하니, 주인께 좋은 향기와 맛이 나는 것도 이상한 일은 아니옵니다.

1000652477.english: Um, if I manage my diet too... will I be able to smell good?
1000652477.korean: 저, 저도 식단을 관리하면… 몸에서 좋은 향기가 날 수 있을까요?

1000652478.english: You don't need to worry, as Miss Portia doesn't smell of anything.
1000652478.korean: 포티아 양에게선 아무런 냄새도 나지 않으니 걱정하지 않아도 괜찮사옵니다.

1000652479.english: Well, still... I sweat more than others, so I'm always worried about it...
1000652479.korean: 그, 그래도… 저는 땀이 남들보다 많이 나서 늘 신경쓰이거든요…

1000652480.english: I envy Ms. Aurora... because Ms. Aurora smells good even when she sweats...
1000652480.korean: 아우로라 씨가 부러워요… 아우로라 씨는 땀에서도 좋은 향기가 나니까…

1000652481.english: Me, I'm just as embarrassed as you are!

1000652482.english: When the commander sticks his nose everyplace and sniffs... ugh...
1000652482.korean: 사령관이 온갖 곳에 코를 박고 킁킁대면… 으아아…

1000652483.english: Aurora, when are you going to give me the new dessert?
1000652483.korean: 아우로라, 그런데 새 디저트는 언제 줄거야?

1000652484.english: Oh, just a moment. I'm going!

1000652485.english: That's right. I'll get the chef's one too. Strawberry flavor is fine, as usual, right?
1000652485.korean: 맞다. 주방장님 것도 해올게요. 평소처럼 딸기 맛이면 되죠?

1000652486.english: I would be very grateful if you could do that.

1000652487.english: Hehe, yes. I'm not sure if I should say this, but when I heard the chef's favorite flavor was strawberry, I thought it was incredibly cute.
1000652487.korean: 헤헷, 네. 이런 말씀드리면 어떨까 싶긴 하지만, 주방장님이 딸기 맛을 제일 좋아한다는 걸 듣고 엄청 귀엽다고 생각했어요.

1000652490.english: ...Come to think of it, it's been a very long time since I tasted strawberry flavor... Hmph...
1000652490.korean: …그러고보니, 딸기 맛을 맛본지… 참으로 오래되었사옵니다. 후후…

1000652492.english: - Mealtime. As always, the meal So-wan prepares looks delicious. However...
1000652492.korean: - 식사 시간. 소완이 차려주는 식사는 여느때처럼 먹음직스러워 보인다. 다만…

1000652493.english: - All the food on the table had strawberries in it.
1000652493.korean: - 식탁에 올라온 음식들에는 전부 딸기가 들어있었다.

1000652494.english: The harmony of nutrition and taste will be perfect.

1000652495.english: - It was clear at a glance that the main ingredient was strawberries, but the cooking method and secondary ingredients were different.
1000652495.korean: - 주재료가 딸기일뿐, 조리방법과 부재료를 달리한 것을 한눈에 봐도 알 수 있었다.

1000652496.english: - I haven't been looking at the work reports lately, so that's possible.
1000652496.korean: - 요새는 업무 보고를 안 보고 있었으니 그럴 수도 있겠군.

1000652497.english: - As I cut a strawberry pie and put a piece in my mouth, So-wan smiled deeply.
1000652497.korean: - 딸기 파이를 잘라 입에 넣는 나를 보며 소완은 짙은 미소를 지었다.

1000652499.english: I just... like the taste of strawberries.

1000652501.english: - While rummaging thru pre-collapse records in the information zone, I found something strange.
1000652501.korean: - 정보 구역에서 멸망 전의 기록들을 뒤적이다 기묘한 것을 찾았다.

1000652502.english: - A community site... a place where humans communicated online before the apocalypse.
1000652502.korean: - 커뮤니티 사이트라… 멸망 전에 인간들이 인터넷으로 소통하던 공간.

1000652503.english: - There were a significant number of posts there that included the word "baby."
1000652503.korean: - 그곳에는 ‘응애’라는 단어를 포함하는 게시글이 상당수 존재했다.

1000652504.english: - Is it like a catchphrase? No, based on the context...
1000652504.korean: - 일종의 유행어 같은 건가? 아니, 문맥상으로 보면…

1000652505.english: - Someone calling someone "maman" and acting spoiled -

1000652506.english: - Is it just my imagination? I thought I heard someone...

1000652507.english: - As life becomes increasingly harsh, human relationships are becoming more isolated, and this is an expression of the desire to receive emotional comfort from others, to that extent...
1000652507.korean: - 삶이 점점 더 각박해지면서, 인간관계가 유리되고 그만큼 타인에게 정서적인 안도감을 받고 싶어 하는 감정의 표출이라…

1000652508.english: - Since I have some time, maybe I should go and get some emotional relief too.
1000652508.korean: - 마침 시간이 있으니까 나도 정서적인 안도감을 좀 느끼러 가볼까.

1000652509.english: - Definitely, there's something fulfilling about being held in a warm embrace.
1000652509.korean: - 확실히, 포근한 품에 안겨있으면 충족되는 무언가가 있다.

1000652510.english: - I steeled my resolve, got up from my seat, and headed toward the aisle.
1000652510.korean: - 마음을 굳히고 자리에서 일어나 통로로 향했다.

1000652513.english: Only I can handle Your Majesty.
1000652513.korean: 폐하를 감당할 수 있는 것은 오직 저 뿐.

1000652514.english: Motherhood isn't just about providing physical comfort.
1000652514.korean: 꼭 신체적인 안도감을 주는 것만이 모성이 아니에요.

1000652515.english: Emotional stability is even more important.

1000652516.english: Emotional stability can only be achieved once physical needs are met.
1000652516.korean: 정서적인 안정감은 우선 신체적 욕구가 채워져야 달성할 수 있답니다.

1000652517.english: We need to hug each other and feel that we're together, because that's the only way we can feel safe.
1000652517.korean: 서로를 끌어안으며, 함께한다는 걸 느껴야지 안심할 수 있으니까요.

1000652519.english: While there are sweet rewards, caring for a child is hard work.
1000652519.korean: 달콤한 보상이 따르긴 하지만, 아이를 돌보는 것은 곧 중노동.

1000652521.english: I only wish to be with my master...

1000652522.english: It seems like no one is willing to give way. Eternity-san, please put away your weapon.
1000652522.korean: 다들 양보할 생각은 없으신 것 같네요~ 이터니티 양은 무기 집어넣으시구요~

1000652523.english: That's the only way it could be. Your Excellency is fundamentally a strong person, so opportunities like this are rare, isn't that right, Princess Cerestia?
1000652523.korean: 그럴 수밖에요. 각하께서는 기본적으로 강인하신분이니, 이런 기회는 흔치 않은 걸 세레스티아 님도 잘 알고 계시지 않습니까.

1000652527.english: Do you know the story of the Judgment of Solomon?

1000652528.english: Continuing the story after "The Judgment of Solomon."

1000652529.english: I'm sorry, it's because of me...

1000652530.english: No, it's not. I'm also a little scared to go outside...
1000652530.korean: 아니에요. 저도 밖에 나가는 건 조금 무섭기도 하고…

1000652531.english: I'm envious of Empress because she's strong and brave...

1000652532.english: You can walk around in the snow all day and not be bothered at all.

1000652751.english: - Amphitrite left the captain's cabin, leaving behind a meaningful remark.
1000652751.korean: - 엠피트리테는 의미심장한 말을 남기고 함장실을 떠났다.

1000652752.english: - Honestly, the underwear of Amphitrite that I caught a glimpse of was very much to my liking.
1000652752.korean: - 솔직히, 살짝 보였던 엠피트리테의 속옷은 몹시 취향이었다.

1000652753.english: < Orca's Adaptation Period in Amphitrite > END.

1000652754.english: The residential area was... this way, right?

1000652757.english: So, you just sit there like that while you wait?
1000652757.korean: 그럼 대기하는 동안 그렇게 앉아만 있는 거야?

1000652758.english: Isn't it better to do something, anything? Hobbies, for example.

1000652762.english: Oh, sorry. Sitting on the bed is a bit... isn't it?
1000652762.korean: 아, 미안. 침대에 앉는건 조금 그렇지?

1000652764.english: It's weird to keep standing while we're talking.

1000652767.english: Is this... an information access log?

1000652769.english: I feel guilty, but... just a little bit...

1000652773.english: I happened to see the information access history.

1000652774.english: It seems there are a lot of views for information specifically about wildflowers.
1000652774.korean: 유독 들꽃에 관한 정보의 열람 횟수가 많더라고.

1000652775.english: Huh? No, no. I'm not saying anything.
1000652775.korean: 어? 아냐아냐. 뭐라고 하는 게 아냐.

1000652778.english: Just... I wanted to get to know you better.

1000652779.english: I thought you seemed to like wildflowers, so I was going to start the conversation with that.
1000652779.korean: 들꽃을 좋아하는 것 같길래, 그거로 이야기를 시작하려고 했지.

1000652780.english: I see. What's the name of this flower?

1000652781.english: Anemone... the name is similar to Mnemosyne.

1000652783.english: Really? It just came to mind right away. Mnemosyne, anemone.
1000652783.korean: 그래? 그냥 바로 떠올라서. 므네모시네, 아네모네.

1000652794.english: Mnemosyne has been in the Ark all this time, so I thought it might be good for her to have a lot of new experiences.
1000652794.korean: 므네모시네는 그동안 방주에만 있었으니까, 새로운 경험을 많이 해보면 어떨까 해서.

1000652796.english: Since I haven't finished tidying up around here yet, I won't be able to go too far, but-
1000652796.korean: 아직 주변 정리가 덜 끝났으니까 그리 멀리 가진 못하겠지만-

1000652805.english: Yeah, that's right. It's incredibly beautiful.

1000652806.english: That's true, but that doesn't mean it's not pretty.
1000652806.korean: 그렇긴 하지만, 그렇다고 예쁘지 않은 건 아니잖아.

1000652808.english: Still, it's a bit disappointing. It would have been nice if it were spring.

1000652812.english: Mnemosyne is a Bioroid, not human, but she's a 'person' who lives life just like I do.
1000652812.korean: 므네모시네는 인간이 아닌 바이오로이드지만, 나처럼 삶을 살아가는 ‘사람’이기 때문이야.

1000652813.english: Well... yeah. It's just a play on words, after all. Like anemones and Mnemosyne.
1000652813.korean: 뭐… 그렇지. 그냥 말장난일 뿐이니까. 아네모네, 므네모시네처럼.

1000652814.english: Still, I think Bioroids and I aren't that different.
1000652814.korean: 그래도 나는 바이오로이드와 내가 별반 다르지 않다고 생각해.

1000652823.english: I may not be qualified, but I'll take responsibility. So you can be happy.
1000652823.korean: 자격은 없지만, 책임은 지겠어. 네가 행복해질 수 있도록.

1000652825.english: I hear that kind of thing sometimes.

1000652826.english: Can we talk for a moment?

1000652828.english: First of all... I should talk to Rhea first.

1000652832.english: Did you find any strawberries that are being preserved somewhere?

1000652836.english: Hmm. There are records analyzing this kind of phenomenon...
1000652836.korean: 흠. 이런 현상을 분석한 기록도 있군…

1000652837.english: Well, I have those days too.

1000652850.english: You don't have to do this. And Salacia too.
1000652850.korean: 굳이 이런 거 안해줘도 돼. 살라시아도 그렇고.

1000652851.english: Oh, I got a gift from Salacia too.

1000652853.english: Salacia also said she was feeling really good.

1000652857.english: Yeah. I was just thinking I needed one.

1000652858.english: Salacia does it for me, and I do it for her... well, that's how it is.
1000652858.korean: 살라시아가 나한테 해주고, 나도 해주고… 뭐, 그렇지.

1000652859.english: Uh, um... should I do the Amphtrite too?

1000652860.english: Um... You don't have to go out of your way to give a gift.
1000652860.korean: 그... 선물은 무리해서 주지 않아도 괜찮아.

1000652862.english: Oh... Well, that's a bit different, you know...
1000652862.korean: 아... 그, 그건 조금 다르다고 해야되나...

1000652863.english: That's absolutely great. I'll be looking forward to it.

1000652864.english: ... I'll be looking forward to it.

1000652865.english: - Although I've settled on the Ark, my main residence is still inside the Orca.
1000652865.korean: - 방주에 정착하게 됐지만, 여전히 나의 주 거처는 오르카 호 내부다.

1000652866.english: - Considering safety, it's only natural, and the Orca is also ready to set sail at any time.
1000652866.korean: - 안전을 생각하면 당연한 일로, 오르카 호는 언제든 출항할 수 있는 준비 또한 되어있다.

1000652867.english: - The bridge looked the same as usual. But...

1000652868.english: Please review the training plan for next year.
1000652868.korean: 내년 훈련 계획에 대한 검토를 부탁드립니다.

1000652869.english: ...I've confirmed it. We've made some revisions to the Q2 schedule as we anticipate a slight issue.

1000652870.english: Thank you. I will review the supply plan for next month.
1000652870.korean: 감사합니다. 다음 달 보급 계획은 제가 검토하겠습니다.

1000652871.english: Oh, I have something else to add, so please wait a moment.

1000652872.english: - Armand and Alpha are handling their tasks smoothly.
1000652872.korean: - 아르망과 알파는 물흐르듯이 업무를 처리해 나가고 있다.

1000652873.english: - I heard that the number of staff in the secretariat has also been increased compared to normal...
1000652873.korean: - 듣기론 비서실에도 평소보다 인원이 증원됐다고 하는데…

1000652876.english: - Armand and Alpha's voices were as gentle as usual, but their eyes and hands were constantly darting between the monitor and the documents.
1000652876.korean: - 아르망과 알파의 목소리는 평소처럼 온화했지만, 눈과 손을 쉴 새 없이 모니터와 서류를 오가고 있다.

1000652877.english: - Embarrassed, I averted my gaze, and a coffee cup was placed in front of me.
1000652877.korean: - 민망해서 시선을 돌리는 내 앞에 커피잔이 놓였다.

1000652879.english: - Vanilla, who had been alternating between looking at Armand and me sipping our coffee, grinned.
1000652879.korean: - 커피를 홀짝이는 나와 아르망, 알파의 모습을 번갈아 보던 바닐라가 씨익 웃었다.

1000652880.english: Congratulations, Master. You've finally lost your reason for being.

1000652881.english: Instead of moping around like that, go out and spend time with others.
1000652881.korean: 그렇게 궁상떨고 계시지 말고 나가서 다른 분들과 시간을 보내세요.

1000652883.english: Then it must be a joke?

1000652884.english: If you're finished with your coffee, please give me your cup and move aside because I need to clean.
1000652884.korean: 커피 다 드셨으면 잔 이리 주시고, 청소해야되니까 비켜주세요.

1000652885.english: - I quickly got up from my seat at Vanilla's fierce glare.
1000652885.korean: - 바닐라의 서슬퍼런 기세에 후다닥 자리에서 일어났다.

1000652886.english: Everyone would be happy to spend even a little bit of time with the master.
1000652886.korean: 아주 조금이라도 주인님과 시간을 보낼 수 있다면 다들 기뻐할 겁니다.

1000652888.english: - I took a moment to recall the memory of spending a day with Vanilla.
1000652888.korean: - 잠시 시간을 내어 바닐라와 한나절 동안 데이트를 했던 기억을 떠올렸다.

1000652890.english: - I smiled at Vanilla, who was looking away, and left the bridge.
1000652890.korean: - 딴청을 부리는 바닐라에게 웃어주고 함교에서 나왔다.

1000652892.english: - No matter how hard I racked my brain, I couldn't think of anything to do, so I decided to start with the health checkup, which is something I need to do anyway.
1000652892.korean: - 아무리 머리를 짜내도 할 일이 생각나지 않아서 일단 해야 되는 일인 건강검진부터 받기로 했다.

1000652893.english: The inspection is complete, sir. There's no particular problem, but...
1000652893.korean: 검사 다 됐어요, 주인님. 특별한 문제는 없지만…

1000652894.english: Um... it's almost time for the procedure...
1000652894.korean: 그… 시술을 할 때가 다 되어가서요…

1000652896.english: - Although I share love with the crew members, it's difficult for us to have children given our circumstances.
1000652896.korean: - 대원들과 사랑을 나누고는 있지만, 우리 여건상 아이를 갖는 것은 어렵다.

1000652897.english: - So, I'm preparing in various ways...

1000652899.english: ...Oh. Today, Sister Lize will be doing it.

1000652900.english: - It's not that I don't trust Lise. Actually, I've asked several times before. But...
1000652900.korean: - 리제를 못 믿는 건 아니다. 실제로 예전에는 몇 번이고 부탁한 적이 있고. 하지만…

1000652901.english: - Lately, Lize blushes and trembles just by looking at the tip of my finger. I wonder if they'll be able to perform the procedure properly...
1000652901.korean: - 요즘 리제는 내 손 끝만 봐도 얼굴을 붉히며 파르르 떠는 상태. 제대로 시술을 할 수 있을지…

1000652903.english: It seems like even you, Master, haven't completely figured out Sister Lize yet.
1000652903.korean: 주인님도 아직 리제 언니를 완벽히 파악하지는 못 하신 것 같아요.

1000652906.english: - Lize, who entered as if taking over from Daphne, didn't seem particularly embarrassed.
1000652906.korean: - 다프네와 교대하듯 들어온 리제는 딱히 부끄러워하는 기색은 없어보였다.

1000652908.english: - With Lise's words, silence fell over the infirmary.
1000652908.korean: - 리제의 말을 끝으로 의무실에는 고요가 내려앉았다.

1000652910.english: - After giving the injection and checking the chart and monitor, Lise let out a small sigh and then...
1000652910.korean: - 주사를 놓고 차트와 모니터를 확인한 리제는 작게 한숨을 내쉰 리제는…

1000652913.english: Please put on the bar and pants yourself...!

1000652915.english: Master? Lize-nee-san ran out, and... oh my.
1000652915.korean: 주인님? 리제 언니가 뛰어 나갔는데… 어머.

1000652916.english: - Daphne, who had spun around, only approached me after I had straightened my clothes.
1000652916.korean: - 빙글 뒤로 돌았던 다프네는 내가 옷매무새를 추스르고 나서야 곁으로 다가왔다.

1000652917.english: The procedure seems to have gone well.

1000652918.english: Because you're so serious about managing your master's health.

1000652919.english: - Like this regular check-up, I'm getting simple physical care from Daphne and Lize.
1000652919.korean: - 이번의 정기검진처럼, 간단한 신체 관리는 다프네와 리제에게 받고 있다.

1000652920.english: - For a while, specifically ever since Lize started running away, Daphne had been taking care of everything, so I had forgotten...
1000652920.korean: - 한동안은, 정확히는 리제가 도망다니기 시작한 후 부터는 줄곧 다프네가 도맡아 해주고 있어서 잊고 있었는데…

1000652921.english: Yes... I was hoping it might be a chance to talk to the master normally again...
1000652921.korean: 네… 혹시 다시 주인님과 평범하게 이야기하는 계기가 될까 했었는데…

1000652922.english: Should I do any special training...?

1000652923.english: Yes. The problem with your sister right now is that she's reacting too strongly to external stimuli.
1000652923.korean: 네. 지금 언니의 문제는 결국 외부 자극에 대한 반응이 너무 크다는 거니까요.

1000652924.english: Little by little, step by step... If you gradually get used to small stimuli, it will get better.
1000652924.korean: 조금씩 차근차근... 작은 자극부터 익숙해져가면 나아질거예요.

1000652925.english: You're trying to tease me by saying I'm getting used to it too, aren't you?
1000652925.korean: 저도 점점 익숙해졌으니까, 하고 놀리시려는 거죠?

1000652926.english: - Daphne, who had turned her head away as if sulking, soon gave a small smile.
1000652926.korean: - 토라진듯 고개를 돌렸던 다프네는 이내 작게 미소지었다.

1000652927.english: ...Yes. Just like I, who knew nothing, became accustomed to the master's touch... I'm sure Sister Lize will too.
1000652927.korean: …네. 아무것도 몰랐던 제가 주인님의 손길에 익숙해진 것처럼… 리제 언니도 분명 그럴 거예요.

1000652929.english: I held Daphne, who had embraced me as if relieved.

1000652931.english: Your next check-up is in two weeks, so please don't forget like you did last time.
1000652931.korean: 다음 검진은 2주 후니까, 저번처럼 잊어버리시면 안 돼요.

1000652933.english: - Daphne, who had been nestled in my arms, flinched.
1000652933.korean: - 내 말에 안겨있던 다프네가 움찔 몸을 떨었다.

1000652934.english: Oh, that's right. If it were you, you would have definitely done it perfectly, but...
1000652934.korean: 그, 그렇네요. 언니라면 분명 완벽하게 하셨겠지만…

1000652935.english: - Daphne slowly climbed onto my body. Unlike his proactive behavior, his face was red as if it were about to burst.
1000652935.korean: - 다프네가 천천히 내 몸 위로 올라왔다. 적극적인 행동과는 달리, 얼굴은 터질 것처럼 붉었다.

1000652936.english: It would be a good idea to check, wouldn't it...?

1000652939.english: For now, securing the area is almost complete... all that's left is the administrative work.
1000652939.korean: 일단 지역 확보는 마무리 되어가고… 남은 건 행정 업무니까-

1000652942.english: - Leona withdrew her hand from her holster and asked me, lying in bed, as if she couldn't believe it.
1000652942.korean: - 레오나는 홀스터에서 손을 거두고, 침대에 누워 있는 내게 어이없다는듯 물었다.

1000652943.english: Are you already getting used to being unemployed?

1000652945.english: - Leona sat on the bed and fixed my bangs.
1000652945.korean: - 레오나는 침대에 걸터앉아서 내 앞머리를 정리해주었다.

1000652946.english: It's cute and nice to see you peeking out from under the covers like that. Did you turn on the electric blanket?
1000652946.korean: 그렇게 이불 덮고 얼굴만 내밀고 있으니까 귀엽고 좋네. 전기매트 켰어?

1000652948.english: - When I grinned, Leonardo grinned back and climbed onto the bed, lying down beside me.
1000652948.korean: - 내가 씨익 웃자 레오나도 마주 웃으며 침대로 올라와 곁에 누웠다.

1000652950.english: Miss Armand made a good decision.

1000652951.english: - At my words, Leona gave a small laugh.

1000652952.english: Just do what you usually do.

1000652953.english: Commander, what did you usually do when you were resting?

1000652954.english: So, what happens after you lose the panel?

1000652955.english: Now you can do that all day long.

1000652956.english: Yeah. Then I'll go wash up.

1000652957.english: If you're tired, go to sleep first.

1000652958.english: Hmph. Then sleep with your arms outstretched.
1000652958.korean: 후후. 팔 벌리고 자고 있어, 그럼.

1000652959.english: - As I spread my arms as wide as I could, Leona gave a small laugh and came closer, kissing my lips.
1000652959.korean: - 내가 양 팔을 있는 힘껏 벌리자 레오나는 작게 웃으며 다가와 내 입술에 입을 맞췄다.

1000652961.english: < Orca Commander-in-Chief (Unemployed) > Continue to the next story.

1000652963.english: - I pulled Leona, who had let out a cute scream, closer and held her in my arms.
1000652963.korean: - 귀여운 비명소리를 낸 레오나를 끌어당겨 품에 안았다.

1000652965.english: - Leon, who was nestled in my arms and had just slapped the back of my hand, said coldly.
1000652965.korean: - 품에 안겨서 내 손등을 찰싹 때린 레오나가 차갑게 말했다.

1000652967.english: If you want to do that, you can just shower together.

1000652968.english: - He sat up and picked up Leona in his arms.

1000652969.english: - Leona naturally wrapped her arms around my neck and murmured.
1000652969.korean: - 레오나는 자연스럽게 내 목에 팔을 감고 중얼거렸다.

1000652970.english: I said no, so why are you still doing that?

1000652971.english: - Soothing Leona, I headed toward the small bathroom attached to the room.
1000652971.korean: - 레오나를 달래주며, 방에 딸린 작은 욕실로 향했다.

1000652972.english: < Orca Commander-in-Chief (Unemployed) > Continue to the next story.

1000652979.english: I've heard about it, but... is it really okay to do that?

1000652982.english: That was definitely the first time I'd seen Vanilla like that.
1000652982.korean: 확실히 바닐라의 그런 모습은 처음 봤었지.

1000652993.english: Yeah. It was like someone else.

1000652996.english: As soon as it was over, I came right back.

1000652998.english: Hmm... that makes sense. Daphne too-

1000653000.english: Thank you for today. I'm going to go now.

1000653001.english: Okay. I'll think about how to do the special training until then.
1000653001.korean: 알았어. 그때까지 특훈을 어떻게 할 지 생각해볼게.

1000653002.english: I'm going on a hotel stamp rally.

1000653005.english: Yeah. So I can't go out.

1000653006.english: My panel was confiscated, so I can't do it even if I want to.
1000653006.korean: 패널 압수당해서 하고 싶어도 못 해.

1000653007.english: Since I'm not working, I don't know what to do...

1000653009.english: Um... just talking and playing with you guys...
1000653009.korean: 음… 그냥 너희랑 얘기하고, 놀기도 하고…

1000653010.english: Talking and playing with you guys...

1000653013.english: Do you not want a pillow arm?

1000653018.english: ...I don't know if the procedure went well.

1000653020.english: The world is wide and full of treasures.

1000653021.english: Crossing the endless sea, passing through rugged mountain ranges!
1000653021.korean: 끝없는 바다를 건너고, 험준한 산맥을 지나!

1000653022.english: Now, the Grand Final Vice Captain Neo New Triaina Adventure Corps has arrived in the Arctic!
1000653022.korean: 지금, 북극에 그랜드 파이널 바이스 캡틴 네오 뉴 트리아이나 모험단이 왔다!

1000653023.english: Hey, what! Are you going to decide the adventure party name all by yourself?
1000653023.korean: 야, 뭐야! 모험단 이름을 혼자 정하기 있어?

1000653024.english: And please come quickly and help. There is a lot of equipment I haven't been able to pack yet.
1000653024.korean: 그리고 빨리 와서 도와줘. 아직 못 챙긴 장비들이 많아.

1000653025.english: That's a compass. It's the North Pole, so would we really need that?

1000653026.english: Since it is based on the magnetic north pole, it will help you determine the direction.
1000653026.korean: 자북극점을 기준으로 하니까 방향 판단에 도움될 거야.

1000653027.english: And since you and I might act separately, it's a good idea to keep several on hand.
1000653027.korean: 그리고 너랑 내가 따로 행동할 수도 있으니까 여러개 챙겨두는 게 좋지.

1000653028.english: You haven't forgotten who's going this time, right?

1000653029.english: Of course! How could I forget my crew as the expedition leader!
1000653029.korean: 물론이지! 탐험대장이 되어서 대원들을 까먹을 수 있나!

1000653031.english: Hahaha... Glorious familiars serving the Princess of the True Ancestors.
1000653031.korean: 후.후.후... 진조의 프린세스를 섬기는 영광스러운 권속들이여.

1000653032.english: I am ready to place Niflheim at my feet. Let us begin the exploration!
1000653032.korean: 짐은 니플헤임을 발밑에 둘 준비를 마쳤노라. 어서 탐험을 개시하자꾸나!

1000653034.english: White Beast, why are you doing this?

1000653036.english: That was a close call, Princess. There was a small stone right in front of you.
1000653036.korean: 하마터면 큰일 날 뻔 했어, 공주님. 바로 앞에 작은 돌멩이가 있었어.

1000653037.english: I might have sprained my ankle if I had stepped on it.

1000653038.english: ...As expected of the True Ancestor's White Beast. Did he grow even more after reaching his peak...!
1000653038.korean: ...역시 진조의 하얀 야수. 정점에 이르러서 한번 더 성장한 건가...!

1000653039.english: Today, I am not a simple white beast.
1000653039.korean: 오늘의 난 단순한 하얀 야수가 아니야.

1000653040.english: Like the main character in the movie I watched with my older sisters...
1000653040.korean: 언니들과 함께 본 영화에서 등장한 주인공처럼...

1000653041.english: He is a perfect bodyguard with not a single flaw.
1000653041.korean: 한 치의 실수도 존재하지 않는 완벽한 보디가드지.

1000653042.english: Then, O shield protecting the burden, the white beast, and the perfect bodyguard, I shall give you a test.
1000653042.korean: 그렇다면 짐을 수호하는 방패이자 하얀 야수, 그리고 완벽한 보디가드여. 한가지 시험을 내리겠노라.

1000653043.english: Can you offer the darkest and sweetest holy object in the world right here and now?
1000653043.korean: 세상에 존재하는 가장 검고, 또 가장 달콤한 성물을 지금 이 자리에서 바칠 수 있겠느냐?

1000653045.english: Just say the word. Which chocolate bar would you like? I stocked up the ammo depot full of them.
1000653045.korean: 말만 해. 어떤 초코바로 줄까? 탄약창에 가득 챙겨왔어.

1000653048.english: The Princess of Jinjo, a perfect bodyguard, and even an expedition leader!
1000653048.korean: 진조의 프린세스와 완벽한 보디가드, 그리고 탐사대장까지!

1000653049.english: It's a perfect setup. This expedition is bound to succeed.
1000653049.korean: 완벽한 구성이야. 이번 탐험은 성공할 수 밖에 없겠는걸.

1000653050.english: Triaina, I've packed all the exploration gear.

1000653051.english: And I got a reply from the commander?

1000653052.english: Oh, to the Captain? What did he say?

1000653053.english: They told me to come back before it's too late. Make sure to take good care of LRL and Alvis.
1000653053.korean: 너무 늦지 않게 돌아오래. LRL이랑 알비스 잘 챙기고.

1000653054.english: Of course! Uh... but what about Setti and Ella?
1000653054.korean: 그거야 당연하지! 어... 그런데 세띠랑 엘라는?

1000653055.english: Ella has already used up a week's worth of energy, so she went to rest. Setti is taking care of Ella.
1000653055.korean: 엘라는 이미 일주일 치 체력 다 써서 쉬러 갔어. 세띠는 엘라 돌보는 중.

1000653056.english: What a shame... It's not a frequent opportunity to explore an unknown place like this.
1000653056.korean: 아쉬운걸... 이런 미지의 장소를 탐험하는 건 자주 오는 기회가 아닌데.

1000653057.english: It can't be helped. Just trust me. This kind of place is my specialty.
1000653057.korean: 별 수 없지. 그래도 나만 믿으라구. 이런 곳은 내 전문이니까.

1000653058.english: Huh? Isn't the Empress from Antarctica?
1000653058.korean: 어? 엠프리스 대원은 남극 출신 아닌가?

1000653059.english: It's just as cold whether it's the South Pole or the North Pole! And besides, this isn't even the North Pole.
1000653059.korean: 남극이든 북극이든 똑같이 춥잖아! 그리고 애초에 여긴 북극도 아니고.

1000653060.english: Oh dear, oh dear. It’s the mindset that matters, Agent Empress. If you explore with the mindset of exploring the Arctic, even the equatorial rainforest can become the Arctic!
1000653060.korean: 이런, 이런. 마음이 중요한 거야, 엠프리스 대원. 북극을 탐험한다는 마음가짐으로 탐험한다면, 적도의 열대우림도 북극이 되는 법!

1000653062.english: Now, Arctic explorers! Let's leave a great footprint in the unknown world!
1000653062.korean: 자아, 북극 탐험대원들이여! 미지의 세계에 위대한 족적을 남기자!

1000653063.english: You changed the expedition name again... By the way, have you decided where to start exploring?
1000653063.korean: 탐험대 이름 또 바꿨네... 근데 어디부터 탐험할지는 정했어?

1000653064.english: Hmm... shall we seek the opinion of Member Empress, the snow expert, regarding that matter?
1000653064.korean: 음... 그 점에 관해선 설원 전문가인 엠프리스 대원의 의견을 구해보도록 할까?

1000653065.english: The weather conditions aren't bad... but since our current equipment might not be enough for the snowy mountains to the north, let's head south.
1000653065.korean: 기상상황은 나쁘지 않고... 북쪽에 있는 설산은 지금 장비로는 부족할 수 있으니까 남쪽으로 가자.

1000653066.english: If you're lucky, you'll be able to see the aurora.
1000653066.korean: 운이 좋으면 오로라를 볼 수 있을 거야.

1000653067.english: Ah, I know that, too. You mean homing instinct?
1000653067.korean: 아, 그거 나도 알아. 귀소본능이란 거지?

1000653069.english: To think the soldiers of Niflheim are already coming to interfere...

1000653070.english: Kneel before me, the Princess of the True Ancestors, and obey!
1000653070.korean: 나, 진조의 프린세스 앞에 무릎 꿇고 복종하라!

1000653072.english: I'll protect you so that not a single hair is hurt!

1000653073.english: What? When did those Iron Bugs appear?

1000653074.english: Unexploration into the unknown is always bound to result in unexpected situations.
1000653074.korean: 미지를 향한 탐험엔 언제나 돌발 상황이 벌어지기 마련.

1000653075.english: Let's go, Empress! Let's help the other members!
1000653075.korean: 가자, 엠프리스 대원! 다른 대원들을 도와주자!

1000653076.english: Is this a bit clearer now?

1000653078.english: Yeah, no problem. Thank you for your help!

1000653079.english: I'm curious, have you secured less territory beyond this point?
1000653079.korean: 궁금한 게 있는데, 이 앞으로는 지역확보 덜 됐어?

1000653080.english: Then there will be problems with the exploration...

1000653081.english: With the last Ironclad we just dealt with, we've secured the area.
1000653081.korean: 지금 처리한 철충을 마지막으로 지역확보 완료됐습니다.

1000653082.english: Our unit is on duty nearby, so please call us if anything happens.
1000653082.korean: 저희 부대는 근처에서 임무 중이니, 무슨 일이 생기면 호출해주십시오.

1000653083.english: Hehe, how's that! My sisters are really good fighters!
1000653083.korean: 히힛, 어때! 우리 언니들 엄청 잘 싸우지!

1000653084.english: Valhalla is definitely the experts. This snowy field, like flat ground...
1000653084.korean: 발할라는 확실히 전문가들이구나. 이런 눈밭을 평지처럼...

1000653085.english: Ugh...! So that's why I suggested exploring together with the Valkyrie sisters...!
1000653085.korean: 으으...! 그래서 발할라 자매들한테 같이 탐험하자고 권유했던 건데...!

1000653086.english: Because the older sisters are very busy. There's nothing we can do.
1000653086.korean: 언니들은 많이 바쁘니까. 어쩔 수 없지.

1000653087.english: Originally, Alvis wasn't supposed to be able to explore either, but I barely got permission from Captain Leona!
1000653087.korean: 원래는 알비스도 탐험 못하는 건데, 레오나 대장님한테 겨우 허락 받았어!

1000653088.english: Then, it was determined that there were no more dangerous elements... I just need to move.
1000653088.korean: 그럼 위험한 요소는 더 없는 걸로 판단됐고... 움직이면 되겠다.

1000653089.english: The surroundings are completely white, so you could lose your sense of direction. Do you all have the equipment I handed out earlier?
1000653089.korean: 주변이 온통 새하얘서 방향감각을 상실할 수 있어. 아까 나눠준 장비는 다 가지고 있지?

1000653092.english: Okay, then... Huh? Where did the LRL members go?
1000653092.korean: 그래, 그럼... 응? LRL 대원은 어디 갔어?

1000653094.english: Oh no. Let's scatter and search quickly!

1000653095.english: O my kin! Come quickly and see what Jim has found!
1000653095.korean: 권속들이여! 어서 와서 짐이 발견한 것을 보거라!

1000653096.english: Is that LRL waving over there? It's a relief you didn't go far.
1000653096.korean: 저기서 손 흔드는 거, LRL 맞지? 멀리 안 가서 다행이다.

1000653097.english: Stay right there, Princess! I don't know what dangers there might be.
1000653097.korean: 거기 가만히 있어, 공주님! 어떤 위험이 있을지 몰라.

1000653098.english: The perfect bodyguard, the white beast, is on his way!
1000653098.korean: 완벽한 보디가드, 하얀 야수가 지금 갈게!

1000653099.english: I just said it's dangerous to act alone...

1000653100.english: That things don't always go according to plan is part of what makes exploration so wonderful.
1000653100.korean: 계획대로 되지 않는 것도 탐험의 멋진 점이지.

1000653101.english: Alright, let's go get the crew first!

1000653103.english: Princess, I was so surprised when you suddenly disappeared!

1000653104.english: LRL members, when you leave your post-

1000653105.english: Hmph, I, Jim, offer my sincere apologies for not following the rules...
1000653105.korean: 후후, 규칙을 지키지 않은 것에는 짐이 심심한 사과를 전하노라...

1000653106.korean: 다만! 이번 일에는 그만한 가치가 있었느니라!

1000653107.english: What's going on? What's going on? Did you find something? Ancient chocolate bar?
1000653107.korean: 뭐야, 뭐야? 뭐 찾았어? 고대의 초코바?

1000653108.english: Hoo hoo hoo... What Jim found was...

1000653110.english: You came all the way here by yourself?

1000653111.english: If I had gotten lost, it would have been really dangerous...

1000653112.english: Jim, the princess of the great True Ancestors, is a possessor of hyper-sense.
1000653112.korean: 위대한 진조의 프린세스인 짐은 하이퍼 센스의 보유자.

1000653113.english: There will never be a mistake of getting lost!
1000653113.korean: 길을 잃어버리는 실책은 결코 없을 지어니!

1000653114.english: LRL team member! You absolutely must follow the adventure guild's safety rules, got it?
1000653114.korean: LRL 대원! 모험단의 안전수칙은 절대 준수야, 알지?

1000653115.english: Exploration of the unknown is a series of dangers. You never know when or where something might pop up.
1000653115.korean: 미지의 탐험은 위험의 연속이라구. 언제 어디서 뭐가 튀어나올지 몰라.

1000653116.english: Princess, how much further do we have to go?

1000653118.english: Um... I think it was around here...

1000653119.english: There's definitely a strangely shaped tree nearby... Ah, I found it!
1000653119.korean: 분명 근처에 특이하게 생긴 나무가... 아, 찾았다!

1000653120.english: Behold, my kin! The dragon that Jim found is right in front of us!
1000653120.korean: 권속들이여, 보아라! 짐이 발견한 드래곤이 바로 이 앞에 있노라!

1000653121.english: Wow! What is that? What is that?

1000653123.english: ... It hasn't even been that long since we started exploring, and we've already found a dragon!

1000653124.english: I knew I had a good feeling about this morning! You've done an amazing job, LRL operative! I'll praise you!
1000653124.korean: 어쩐지 아침부터 좋은 예감이 들더라니까! 엄청난 일을 해냈구나, LRL 대원! 칭찬할게!

1000653125.english: Whew. Whew. Whew... That's not all.

1000653129.english: Dragon Slayer? What's that, Empress crew member? I don't think I've heard that before.
1000653129.korean: 드래곤 슬레이어? 그게 뭐지, 엠프리스 대원? 난 못 들어본 거 같은데.

1000653130.english: It's a manga that was popular a while ago. It became incredibly popular and was adapted into a video in various media.
1000653130.korean: 예전에 유행하던 만화야. 엄청난 인기를 끌고 각종 매체에서 영상화됐어.

1000653131.english: I've seen it in movies, but this is the first time I'm seeing it in person.
1000653131.korean: 영화로 본 적은 있는데, 실제로 보는 건 처음이네.

1000653132.english: Heeing... I was going to explain, but...

1000653134.english: I, I don't know anything more detailed than this either.
1000653134.korean: 나, 나도 이 이상 자세한 건 몰라.

1000653135.english: Could you have an LRL member give the next explanation?
1000653135.korean: 다음 설명은 LRL 대원이 해주지 않을래?

1000653137.english: That's right! The person who found it was also an LRL member, and only LRL members know the details!
1000653137.korean: 맞아! 발견한 사람도 LRL 대원이고, 자세히 아는 것도 LRL 대원뿐인 걸!

1000653138.english: So, so what? Why is the dragon asleep?
1000653138.korean: 그래서, 그래서? 드래곤이 잠들어 있는 이유가 뭐야?

1000653140.english: ... Hoo hoo! As expected of the Akashic Records' owner, I can't do without you!
1000653140.korean: ...후후! 역시 아카식 레코드의 소유자, 짐이 없으면 안 되는군!

1000653141.english: Right now, Glacias's consciousness is sinking into a deep abyss! He's fallen asleep in a safe place, resting and recovering from the fatigue of the battle with the evil dragon.
1000653141.korean: 지금 글라시아스는 깊은 심연에 의식이 가라앉은 상태! 안전한 곳에서 잠에 빠져들어, 악룡과의 전투에서 쌓인 피로를 풀어내고 있지.

1000653142.english: In other words, he won't open his eyes again until he's fully recovered!
1000653142.korean: 즉, 완전히 회복되기 전까지는 절대로 눈을 뜨지 않을 것이다!

1000653143.english: Huh? So you can't talk now?
1000653143.korean: 어? 그럼 지금 얘기 못하는 거야?

1000653145.english: So, there's nothing we can do but let it pass? Oh dear...
1000653145.korean: 이대로 지나칠 수 밖에 없는 거네? 이런...

1000653146.english: I was hoping to at least have a conversation, but that's a shame.

1000653147.english: Then let's just report the location to the commander. And keep exploring.
1000653147.korean: 그럼 사령관에게 위치만 보고하자. 그리고 계속 탐험하는 걸로.

1000653149.english: Hoo hoo. It's my turn to step up now!

1000653150.english: There's a spell to wake Glacius from his deep sleep...
1000653150.korean: 깊은 잠에 빠져든 글라시아스를 깨우는 주문이 있지...

1000653152.english: Gatekeepers and minions of darkness, and all their kin! Get up and serve your master!
1000653152.korean: 어둠의 문지기와 하수인, 그리고 그 권속이여! 일어나 네 주인을 섬겨라!

1000653156.english: That, that can't be... Okay. I'll try a different order.
1000653156.korean: 그, 그럴 리가... 그래. 다른 주문을 써보겠다.

1000653157.english: Abyss darker than pitch black, rise and obey your master's command.
1000653157.korean: 칠흑보다 어두운 심연이여, 일어나 그대의 주인의 명령을 따르라.

1000653158.english: A light brighter than the sun's... Huh?!

1000653159.english: Self-check complete. Special Notes: Slight error confirmed in component assembly.
1000653159.korean: [자가점검 완료. 특이사항, 부품 결합에 미세한 오차 확인.]

1000653160.english: [Possibility of restoration, analysis... Impossible. No special remarks.
1000653160.korean: [원복 가능성, 분석... 불가. 별도의 특이사항, 없음.]

1000653166.english: It seems like they've gotten up, but... It's not moving.
1000653166.korean: 일어난 거 같긴 한데... 움직이지는 않네.

1000653167.english: They're not going to attack suddenly, are they?

1000653168.english: Don't leave my shield, Princess. You never know what might happen.
1000653168.korean: 내 방패에서 벗어나지 마, 공주님. 무슨 일이 벌어질지 몰라.

1000653169.english: You absolutely must not show your face, got it?
1000653169.korean: 절대로 얼굴 내밀면 안 돼, 알았지?

1000653170.english: Hmm... Are you still half asleep? There's no particular reaction.
1000653170.korean: 음... 아직 잠이 덜 깼나? 별다른 반응이 없네.

1000653171.english: It's definitely a huge harvest! I should report this to the captain.
1000653171.korean: 엄청난 수확인 건 확실하니까! 캡틴한테 보고해야겠다.

1000653172.english: Wow, now I finally feel like a proper expedition leader.
1000653172.korean: 이야~ 이제야 탐험대장으로서의 면목이 서는 걸.

1000653174.english: I had so much I wanted to say when we met...

1000653178.english: In front of me...! Really, Glacias...!

1000653180.english: Princess! Are you okay? Are you listening to me?
1000653180.korean: 공주님! 괜찮아? 내 말 듣고 있어?
